summary: Iteration 75: Verified Finance Tab (Zoho Books/QuickBooks), Custom Domains, and Order Refund features. All new APIs tested successfully. UI verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Finance Tab: Tile-based layout with Zoho Books (connected/not connected states) and QuickBooks (Coming Soon) - VERIFIED
Zoho Books Slide Panel: Setup guide, Connection Status, Datacenter selector, Client ID/Secret fields, Access Token, Validate Connection button - VERIFIED
Custom Domains: Located in Website Content > Custom Domains submenu - VERIFIED
Order Refund: Refund button visible on paid/partially_refunded orders in Actions column - VERIFIED
Refund Dialog: Shows order info, Already Refunded amount, Available to Refund, Amount input, Reason dropdown, Provider dropdown (Manual/Stripe/GoCardless), Process Refund button - VERIFIED
MOCKED: Zoho Books integration is stubbed - no actual Zoho API calls made. Sync jobs are queued but not actually processed.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 core tests passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test orders. Created TEST_ prefixed refund during manual refund test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified: 1) Finance Tab at /admin under INTEGRATIONS section - shows Zoho Books tile (clickable to open slide panel) and QuickBooks tile (Coming Soon). 2) Custom Domains found under Website Content > Custom Domains submenu. 3) Order Refunds: Refund button visible in Orders tab for paid/partially_refunded orders. Dialog shows order total, already refunded amount, and available to refund. Provider options: Manual, Stripe, GoCardless. 4) All existing functionality (login, customers, orders) working correctly.

finance_tab_api.GET_finance_status: PASS - Returns zoho_books and quickbooks objects with is_configured, is_validated, datacenter, etc.

order_refunds_api.POST_order_refund_manual: PASS - Creates refund record for paid orders
order_refunds_api.GET_order_refunds: PASS - Returns refund history for order

finance_tab_ui.zoho_books_tile: PASS - Shows Not Connected status, clickable
finance_tab_ui.zoho_slide_panel: PASS - Setup guide, credentials form, validate button

order_refund_ui.refund_dialog: PASS - Shows order info, amount input, reason, provider selects
order_refund_ui.refund_dialog_elements: PASS - Amount input, Reason select, Provider select, Submit button

mocked_apis_note: Zoho Books integration is MOCKED/STUBBED. No actual Zoho API calls are made. Sync jobs are created but not processed.
